headline: Evernorth Launches Pharmacy Forward: A Simpler, Faster Specialty Pharmacy Experience for Patients Managing Complex Conditions
summary: As specialty care becomes more complex, patients need faster, more connected, and personalized support. To help meet that need, Evernorth, the health services division of The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI), today unveiled Pharmacy Forward, a new AI-powered program designed to improve how patients access and experience specialty care. Launching first with Accredo Specialty Pharmacy – which serves patients with chronic and complex specialty conditions through condition-specific Therapeutic Resource Centers
